subcodes.first_line: O Ahmad! In the nights and days render thanks and praise unto God, glorified be His majesty, inasmuch as He hath favored thee with His days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا احمد در لیالی و ایام حق جل جلاله را شکر نما و ثنا گو چه که ترا بایامش فائز
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Greatest Name
